data.description:
At True Hope Foundation, we value your trust and are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, safeguard, and maintain your Personal Information when you interact with our website, services, campaigns, and related platforms. It also outlines your rights and choices regarding your data, including how you can review or update your information. 

This Policy applies solely to our Website and Services and does not cover the privacy practices of third-party entities beyond our control.
data.sub_title: How we protect your information
data.title: Privacy Policy

relatedCMS.description:
When you visit our Website, certain technical information is automatically collected by our servers and analytics systems through your browser or device. This helps us maintain the security, performance, and overall functionality of the Website.

The information we may automatically collect includes:

  • IP address of your device
  • Browser type and version
  • Device and operating system type
  • Language and regional preferences
  • The web page or source you visited before reaching our Website
  • Pages viewed, time spent, and other general usage statistics
  • Date, time, and frequency of visits

We use this information to:

  • Detect and prevent fraudulent activity, misuse, or unauthorized access
  • Identify potential abuse or security threats
  • Monitor Website performance and improve user experience
  • Understand visitor behavior through aggregated statistical insights
  • Enhance the effectiveness of our campaigns, donation journeys, and support services

This data is collected in a non-personal and aggregated manner wherever possible, and it is not used to personally identify individual users unless required for security or legal purposes.
relatedCMS.title: Automated Collection of Information

relatedCMS.description:
You can visit and browse our Website without revealing your identity or providing any personal details. However, to access certain features, services, or campaigns, you may be required to share specific Personal Information with us.

The types of information we may collect include:

  • Personal details (such as your name and country of residence)
  • Contact information (such as your email address, phone number, or physical address)
  • Account details (such as username, unique user ID, and password)
  • Information about others (for example, details of family members or beneficiaries you choose to support or refer)
  • User-generated content (such as feedback, testimonials, images, or other submissions shared on our platform)

If you provide Personal Information about another individual, you confirm that you have obtained their consent to share such information with us.
relatedCMS.title: Collections of Personal information

relatedCMS.description:
We collect and process Personal Information to:

  • Create and manage user accounts
  • Fulfill and manage orders
  • Deliver products or services
  • Improve our services and Website
  • Send administrative notifications
  • Send marketing or promotional communications
  • Respond to inquiries and support requests
  • Request feedback
  • Enhance user experience
  • Publish customer testimonials
  • Deliver targeted advertisements
  • Administer contests or promotions
  • Enforce policies and terms
  • Protect against abuse, fraud, or malicious activity
  • Respond to legal obligations
  • Operate and manage the Website and Services
  • The processing of Personal Information depends on your interaction with the Website, your location, and applicable legal requirements.
relatedCMS.title: Use and Processing of Information

relatedCMS.description:
4. Bills and Payments 

  • To ensure secure and reliable transactions, all payments and donations on our Website are handled by authorized third-party payment gateways. Any information shared during the payment process is subject to the privacy practices of the respective payment provider. We encourage users and donors to review their privacy policies before proceeding with a transaction.
relatedCMS.title: Billing and Payments

relatedCMS.description:
• You may request to delete certain Personal Information.
  • However, copies may be retained as necessary for legal, compliance, or partner obligations.
  • To delete Personal Information or accounts, please contact us.
relatedCMS.title: Managing Information

relatedCMS.description:
We may share Personal Information with:

  • Trusted third parties, affiliates, and subsidiaries to provide requested services
  • Third-party service providers strictly for designated functions (not personal use)
  • Legal authorities, if required by law or to protect rights, safety, or prevent fraud
  • Business partners in case of merger, acquisition, or business transfer
relatedCMS.title: Disclosure of Information

relatedCMS.description:
• We retain Personal Information as long as necessary to comply with laws, resolve disputes, and enforce agreements.
  • After the retention period, Personal Information will be deleted.
  • Aggregated, non-identifiable data may still be used.
relatedCMS.title: Retention of Information

relatedCMS.description:
You may exercise the following rights regarding your Personal Information:

  • Withdraw consent
  • Object to processing
  • Access your data
  • Verify accuracy
  • Correct or update information
  • Restrict processing
  • Receive information in a machine-readable format (data portability)

Requests can be made by contacting us (see Section 16). We may require identity verification.
relatedCMS.title: User Rights

relatedCMS.description:
Protecting the privacy of children is extremely important to us. Our Website and Services are not intended for individuals under the age of 18, and we do not knowingly collect, use, or store Personal Information from children.

We encourage parents and legal guardians to actively supervise their children’s online activities and help ensure that no Personal Information is shared through our Website without appropriate consent.

  • If you believe that a child under the age of 18 has provided Personal Information to us, please contact us immediately so that we can take prompt steps to review and remove such information from our records.
relatedCMS.title: Privacy of Children

relatedCMS.description:
Our Website uses cookies to enhance your experience. Cookies may be used for:

  • Personalization
  • Analytics and statistics

You may choose to accept or decline cookies. Declining may limit certain features.

Learn more: internetcookies.org
relatedCMS.title: Cookies

relatedCMS.description: Our Website currently does not interpret Do Not Track (DNT) signals.
relatedCMS.title: Do Not Track Signals

relatedCMS.description:
Our Website uses cookies to enhance your experience. Cookies may be used for:

  • Users may voluntarily subscribe to newsletters.
  • Email addresses are kept confidential.
  • We comply with CAN-SPAM Act requirements.
  • You can unsubscribe at any time.
relatedCMS.title: Email Marketing

relatedCMS.description:
• Our Website may contain links to non-affiliated websites.
  • We are not responsible for their privacy practices. Please review their privacy policies separately.
relatedCMS.title: Links to Other Websites

relatedCMS.description:
We take reasonable precautions to protect Personal Information by:

  • Hosting on secure servers
  • Implementing administrative, technical, and physical safeguards

However, no method of data transmission or storage is 100% secure.
relatedCMS.title: Information Security

relatedCMS.description:
If a security breach occurs that compromises Personal Information:

  • We will investigate immediately.
  • Notify affected users if there is a risk of harm or as required by law.
relatedCMS.title: Data Breach

relatedCMS.description:
We may update this Policy at any time.

  • Material changes will be communicated to users.
  • Continued use of the Website means acceptance of the updated Policy.
relatedCMS.title: Changes and Amendments

relatedCMS.description:
By using the Website or Services, you acknowledge that you have read and agree to this Privacy Policy.

If you do not agree, please discontinue use of our Website and Services.
relatedCMS.title: Acceptance of Policy

relatedCMS.description: For questions about this Policy or your Personal Information rights, contact us at: contact@truehopefoundation.in
relatedCMS.title: Contacting Us

data.description: Please read these terms and conditions carefully before using our services. By accessing our platform, you agree to be bound by these terms.
data.sub_title: Guidelines for using our platform
data.title: Terms of Service

relatedCMS.description:
Please read these Terms and Conditions (“Terms”) carefully before using https://truehopefoundation.in (the “Website”), operated by True Hope Foundation (“we,” “us,” or “our”).

By accessing or using our Website, services, campaigns, donation features, or any related content (collectively, the “Services”), you agree to be bound by these Terms and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not agree with any part of these Terms, you should not access or use the Website.

These Terms apply to all visitors, donors, users, campaigners, and any other individuals who interact with our Services.
relatedCMS.title: General Terms and Conditions

relatedCMS.description:
If you choose to make a donation or payment through our Website, you may be required to provide certain information necessary to process your transaction, verify your identity, and fulfill your donation request.

For details on how we collect, use, and protect your information, please refer to our Privacy Policy.
relatedCMS.title: Purchases/Donations

relatedCMS.description:
Our Website may allow users to post, submit, share, or otherwise make available content including text, images, videos, feedback, testimonials, or other materials (“Content”).

By submitting Content, you agree that it must be lawful, respectful, relevant to our mission, and not harmful, offensive, misleading, or inappropriate for our audience.

We reserve the right to remove any Content that, in our sole discretion, does not align with the purpose, values, or standards of our Website, without prior notice. Users who repeatedly post offensive, abusive, misleading, or irrelevant content may be restricted or permanently banned from using our Services.
relatedCMS.title: User Content

relatedCMS.description:
Our Website may contain links to third-party websites, services, or payment platforms that are not owned or controlled by True Hope Foundation.

We do not assume responsibility for the content, policies, practices, or accuracy of information on any third-party website. Your interactions with such websites are solely at your own discretion and risk.

We shall not be held liable, directly or indirectly, for any loss, damage, or issues arising from your use of or reliance on third-party content, products, or services.
relatedCMS.title: Links To Third-Party Websites

relatedCMS.description: We reserve the right to update, modify, or replace these Terms at any time at our sole discretion. Any changes will become effective immediately upon being posted on the Website. Continued use of the Website after such updates constitutes your acceptance of the revised Terms.
relatedCMS.title: Changes To Terms

relatedCMS.description: By making a donation, you acknowledge and agree that the funds contributed may be allocated across multiple essential areas, including campaign support, beneficiary aid, rescue and shelter activities, operational requirements, platform maintenance, and advertising or promotional expenses required to increase campaign reach and impact.
relatedCMS.title: Donation Allocation

data.description: Learn about our refund policy for donations and transactions. We are committed to transparency and will process eligible refunds according to our guidelines.
data.sub_title: Understanding our refund process
data.title: Refund & Cancellation Policy

relatedCMS.description: At True Hope Foundation, we are committed to maintaining transparency, fairness, and trust in every transaction made through our Website.
relatedCMS.title: Refunds

relatedCMS.description:
We make every effort to accurately represent the size, quality, delivery method, description, images, and pricing of any products or fundraising merchandise offered through our Website in support of charitable causes.

If you experience any issue related to the product received, including concerns about quality, incorrect delivery, or discrepancies in the description, please contact us. All refund and replacement requests will be carefully reviewed on a case-by-case basis.
relatedCMS.title: Refunds for Products and Fundraising Merchandise

relatedCMS.description:
We strive to ensure that all donations, sponsorships, and recurring contributions are collected securely and accurately through our authorized third-party payment gateways.

If you face any issue related to:

  • incorrect donation amount
  • duplicate transaction
  • technical payment error
  • failed acknowledgment or confirmation
  • recurring sponsorship concerns
  • accidental donation
  • change of mind

Please reach out to us through our Contact Page with the transaction details.

We take all donor concerns seriously, and refund requests for donations or sponsorships will be evaluated fairly on a case-by-case basis, depending on the nature of the request and the stage of fund allocation.
relatedCMS.title: Refunds for Donations and Sponsorships

data.description:
True Hope Foundation deeply value all contributions to sustain our mission. However, in the event of cancelling your donation, we follow a reliable refund policy, ensuring you, our donor has a hassle-free experience. We take utmost care about processing donations as per the mandates signed by our donors in the donor forms, both offline and online. In case of an unlikely event of an erroneous deduction or if the donor wants to cancel/deduct the donation, True Hope Foundation will respond within 7 working days from the date of receiving the request from donor.

Kindly note, the timely refund of the wrongly deduced amount will depend on the type of card used during the transaction. True Hope Foundation will require proof of the donation amount deducted, along with written communication for refund from the donor within two days after donation has been made.

If the 10bd (tax exemption certificate) has already been issued, a refund of the donation amount will not be applicable. In other cases, the donation amount will be refunded after the deducting the donation processing charges, as per the payment gateway service charges.

To raise a refund request, contact us:

TRUE HOPE FOUNDATION

C-79 Shankar Nagar, Jodhpur, Rajasthan - 342008

Email: contact@truehopefoundation.in
data.sub_title: Our return and exchange guidelines

data.description: Find answers to common questions about making donations, tax benefits, payment methods, and how your contributions are used.
data.sub_title: Everything you need to know about donating
data.title: Frequently Asked Questions for Donors

relatedCMS.description: True Hope Foundation is a trusted crowdfunding platform supporting urgent medical cases and NGOs in need. With more than 200 successful medical fundraisers, we connect patients and organizations with compassionate donors across the country. Lakhs of people have already come forward to support causes through our platform. Every campaign is fully verified to ensure complete transparency, and donations also come with tax benefits, making it easier for people to contribute to meaningful change.
relatedCMS.title: What is the True Hope Foundation?

relatedCMS.description: Donating to the True Hope Foundation is simple and secure. You can contribute to any verified medical case or NGO listed on our platform using multiple payment options such as UPI, debit card, credit card, net banking, or digital wallets. Once your donation is completed, you will receive a confirmation and a receipt for your contribution.
relatedCMS.title: How can I donate to the True Hope Foundation?

relatedCMS.description: Donors contributing to eligible campaigns can claim tax benefits under Section 80G of the Income Tax Act. Once your donation is processed, a receipt with the 80G details will be automatically sent to your registered email. This receipt and the Form 10BE certificate can be used while filing your income tax returns to claim the applicable tax deduction.
relatedCMS.title: How to avail 10BE?

relatedCMS.description: True Hope Foundation does not charge a mandatory platform fee for donations. Instead, we provide donors with the option to add a small voluntary tip to help support the platform’s operational costs such as campaign verification, payment processing, technology maintenance, and donor support services.
relatedCMS.title: Why do we collect a tip amount?

relatedCMS.description: True Hope Foundation is committed to complete transparency and authenticity. Every medical case and NGO campaign goes through a strict verification process before being published on our platform. With 200+ successful medical fundraisers and lakhs of compassionate donors, we ensure that contributions reach genuine causes that truly need support.
relatedCMS.title: Why should I trust the True Hope Foundation?

relatedCMS.description: Donations made on the True Hope Foundation are usually non-refundable, as the funds are transferred to the respective campaign for urgent medical or social needs. However, in exceptional situations such as duplicate transactions or technical errors, donors may contact our support team for assistance.
relatedCMS.title: Can I get a refund on my donation?

relatedCMS.description: True Hope Foundation connects donors with verified medical cases and NGOs that need urgent support. Our platform focuses on transparency, authenticity, and impact, ensuring that every campaign is thoroughly verified before fundraising begins. With the support of lakhs of donors and hundreds of successful campaigns, we strive to make giving safe, meaningful, and impactful.
relatedCMS.title: What makes True Hope Foundation a better option for your donations?

data.description: Information for NGOs and organizations interested in partnering with us. Learn about collaboration opportunities and requirements.
data.sub_title: Partner with us to create impact
data.title: Questions for NGOs and Organizations

relatedCMS.description: Product delivery timelines may vary depending on the campaign requirements and logistics. Once a campaign receives sufficient support, the products are processed and delivered to the beneficiary organization within a reasonable timeframe coordinated by the True Hope team.
relatedCMS.title: When will the products be delivered to us?

relatedCMS.description: Campaigns on True Hope Foundation are flexible and can run for a duration that best suits the needs of your cause. The campaign period is usually decided based on the urgency and scale of the requirement, ensuring you have adequate time to reach supporters and raise the necessary resources.
relatedCMS.title: How long can my campaign run on True Hope?

relatedCMS.description: True Hope Foundation connects compassionate donors with verified causes that genuinely need support. Every campaign on our platform undergoes a careful review process to ensure authenticity and credibility. We are committed to maintaining transparency at every step, so donors can feel confident that their contributions are reaching the right people and creating real impact. Through True Hope, people from different places who care about making a difference can come together to support meaningful causes and bring hope to those who need it most.
relatedCMS.title: Why do donors choose True Hope over other crowdfunding platforms?

relatedCMS.description: Campaigns on True Hope focus on raising essential products needed by organizations and communities in need. These may include food supplies, medicines, medical equipment, clothing, educational materials, animal care supplies, and other basic necessities depending on the nature of the campaign.
relatedCMS.title: What types of products can be raised through these campaigns?

relatedCMS.description: Starting a campaign with True Hope Foundation is simple. You can reach out to our team through the website and share details about your organization and the cause you wish to support. Once the information is reviewed and approved, our team will guide you through the campaign setup process and help you launch it on the platform.
relatedCMS.title: How can I start a campaign with the True Hope Foundation?

relatedCMS.description: Donors contribute products by supporting campaigns listed on the True Hope platform. Once a donor chooses to support a campaign, the requested products are arranged through verified partners and allocated directly for the specific cause, ensuring transparency and proper utilization.
relatedCMS.title: How do donors provide products to our organization?

relatedCMS.description: Yes, the True Hope Foundation team provides guidance and support throughout the campaign process. This includes assistance with campaign setup, content, visibility on the platform, and coordination to ensure that the campaign reaches potential supporters effectively.
relatedCMS.title: Will True Hope assist us with running the campaign?

data.description: Common questions about medical campaigns, verification process, fund disbursement, and how to start a medical fundraiser.
data.sub_title: Support medical emergencies and healthcare
data.title: Medical Campaign Questions

relatedCMS.description: Starting a medical campaign is simple. You can contact the True Hope Foundation team and share details about the patient, the medical condition, and the required treatment. After reviewing the information and necessary documents, the team will help you create and publish your campaign on the platform.
relatedCMS.title: How can I start a medical campaign on the True Hope Foundation?

relatedCMS.description: You can raise support for a wide range of medical needs such as surgeries, hospital bills, medicines, diagnostic tests, long-term treatments, or emergency medical care. The campaign can be created based on the specific medical requirement of the patient.
relatedCMS.title: What type of medical treatments or expenses can I raise support for?

relatedCMS.description: Every medical campaign shared on the platform goes through a verification process. The True Hope team reviews the provided documents and information to ensure the case is authentic before it is published, helping donors support with confidence.
relatedCMS.title: How will donors know that my medical case is genuine?

relatedCMS.description: You will be informed when supporters contribute to your campaign. The platform keeps track of the support received, allowing you to stay updated on the progress of your campaign.
relatedCMS.title: How will I know when someone supports my medical campaign?

relatedCMS.description: To ensure authenticity, you may be asked to provide relevant medical documents such as doctor’s prescriptions, medical reports, hospital estimates, identification proof, and other supporting details related to the treatment.
relatedCMS.title: What documents do I need to provide to start my medical campaign?

relatedCMS.description: The duration of a medical campaign may vary depending on the urgency and treatment timeline. The campaign can remain active for a suitable period to allow supporters enough time to contribute and help reach the required goal.
relatedCMS.title: How long can my medical campaign remain active on the platform?

relatedCMS.title: Our Values

data.description: Welcome to True Hope Foundation, a heartfelt initiative dedicated to transforming lives through timely financial support and community-driven care. Established in 2023 and rooted in Rajasthan, our foundation is committed to leveraging the power to extend a helping hand to those in need.
data.sub_title: Dedicated to making a difference
data.title: We are a purpose-driven giving platform committed to turning compassion into meaningful change

relatedCMS.description: At True Hope Foundation, we recognize that financial hardships can feel overwhelming- whether it is urgent medical treatment, a child’s education, shelter needs, animal welfare, or unexpected emergencies. Our mission is to bridge this gap by bringing compassionate people together and turning collective kindness into real, life-changing support.
relatedCMS.title: Team Members

relatedCMS.description: Learn about our organizational structure and how we operate to maximize impact.
relatedCMS.title: Organization Structure

relatedCMS.description: Discover our global presence and the international reach of our charitable work.
relatedCMS.title: Global Presence

data.description: At True Hope Foundation, we envision a world where financial barriers do not hinder individuals from accessing essential resources for social and medical needs. We strive to be a beacon of hope for those who find themselves unable to fund crucial aspects of their lives, whether it be addressing pressing social issues or overcoming medical challenges.
data.sub_title: At True Hope Foundation, we envision a world where financial barriers do not hinder individuals from accessing essential resources for social and medical needs.
data.title: Our vision is to set new standards through integrity, compassion, innovation, and impact

relatedCMS.description: Our primary motive is to provide a helping hand to those in need, fostering a global community that cares. Through the transformative power, we aim to bridge the gap between compassion and action, enabling people from all walks of life to contribute towards creating a positive impact.
relatedCMS.title: 3k+

relatedCMS.description: Explore our specific impact goals and the measurable targets we have set.
relatedCMS.title: Impact Goals

relatedCMS.description: Understand our vision for building stronger, more resilient communities worldwide.
relatedCMS.title: Community Vision

data.description: True Hope Foundation is dedicated to preventing tragedies that result from financial constraints. Whether it’s a life-saving medical treatment or urgent support during a crisis, our mission is to ensure that no one loses their life due to a lack of funds. Every contribution on our platform is a step toward preserving lives and offering hope.
data.sub_title: Empowering communities through giving
data.title: Our mission is to transform ideas into experiences that enrich lives.

relatedCMS.description: Recognizing the tireless efforts of individuals and NGOs making a positive impact on communities, True Hope Foundation stands by those who selflessly serve others. Our mission is to ensure that these changemakers do not face undue hardships due to financial constraints. Together, we can empower those who dedicate themselves to the well-being of our communities.
relatedCMS.title: Mission Impact

relatedCMS.description: Learn about our strategic initiatives and core programs that drive our mission forward.
relatedCMS.title: Strategic Initiatives

relatedCMS.description: Discover our mission partners and collaborative efforts to create greater impact.
relatedCMS.title: Mission Partners

data.description: Our strength lies in our community of donors, dedicated team, transparent operations, and proven track record of successful campaigns. Together, we are creating meaningful change.
data.sub_title: Built on trust, transparency, and impact
data.title: Our strength is to transform kindness into action, hope, healing, and dignity.

relatedCMS.description: We hold campaigners in high regard, recognizing the difficulties they endure. We empathize with the challenges they face, particularly in the context of medical emergencies, and understand the profound value of financial assistance during these critical moments. Our commitment is rooted in the understanding of their plight, and we stand ready to offer support and aid to alleviate their burdens.
relatedCMS.title: We Understand

relatedCMS.description: We highly value your experience from the moment you decide to make a donation, throughout the process, and even after. As a token of our commitment to transparency, you will receive consistent updates from the campaign you supported. These updates will keep you informed about the journey of your donation, including details on delivery, distribution, and the impactful use of the products. Your connection with the cause remains a priority for us, and we want you to witness the positive change your generosity brings.
relatedCMS.title: Receive Regular Updates

relatedCMS.description: We take pride in ensuring transparency in our donation process. All the items you contribute to are directly delivered to the designated NGOs by our team. There are no monetary transactions involved with the NGOs; you have clear visibility into the specific items you donate and their intended destination. Your generosity directly translates into tangible impact, and we are committed to providing you with a clear and direct channel to make a positive difference.
relatedCMS.title: Safe and Transparent

relatedCMS.description: Prior to featuring any campaign on our platform, our dedicated team conducts thorough assessments by physically visiting the locations of NGOs or individuals. This meticulous process involves verifying the authenticity of their work and confirming the genuine need for their campaign. Only after confirming the legitimacy of their efforts do we onboard them on our platform. This ensures that every campaign showcased on our platform is authentic and aligned with our commitment to supporting genuine causes.
relatedCMS.title: Verified Campaigner

relatedCMS.description: You can donate through our official website using debit/credit card, UPI, or net banking. Monthly and one-time donation options are available.

relatedCMS.description: Every donation directly supports our ongoing projects – including children's education, healthcare support, and community welfare programs.
relatedCMS.title: Account Management

relatedCMS.description: Yes, all donations made to True Hope Foundation are eligible for tax benefits under Section 80G of the Income Tax Act. After your donation is processed, you’ll receive an 80G donation receipt via email, which you can use while filing your income tax return to claim your deduction.
relatedCMS.title: Is my donation tax-deductible?

The vendor earns income from the sale, and the NGO receives essential goods - creating a dual impact from a single purchase.
